name: lock-acquire on the rule_cache section creates the corresponding lockfile entry
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rule_cache --owner pid-1234 --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock ] && echo ok 1>&2
